value.found_quote: User instructions ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md Personal preferences for all projects Code styling preferences, personal tooling shortcuts Just you (all projects)
value.rationale: The page describes user-level memory via the user-scoped CLAUDE.md file at ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md, which holds "Personal preferences for all projects" shared with "Just you (all projects)." It also describes user-level rules in ~/.claude/rules/ that "apply to every project on your machine." This substantiates user-level memory shared across all projects, and it is presented as a current, active capability.
